description: You are an energy auditor modeling weatherization upgrades. Energy3D is open with the baseline project `~/Documents/Energy3D/building-passive-heating.ng3`. Retrofit the larger house (the one with the yellow door) by making the following envelope upgrades: 1. Change the Roof U-value to 0.15 W/(m²·K). 2. Change the U-value of ALL Walls in the building to 0.30 W/(m²·K) (use the 'Apply to All Walls' context menu). 3. Change the U-value of ALL Windows to 1.50 W/(m²·K). 4. Change the Air Infiltration Rate of the building to 0.4. After updating these properties, run the Annual Building Energy Analysis for that building. Finally, save the modified project as `~/Documents/Energy3D/weatherized_home.ng3`.
